query: SELECT i.id, i.deviceCode, i.slaveId, i.modelType, cp.ipAddress, cp.networkPort FROM weighingInstruments i LEFT JOIN gatewayComPorts cp ON i.comPortId = cp.id WHERE i.deviceCode = 'C001'; SELECT ic.id, ic.channelNo, ic.label, ic.scale, ic.offset, ic.unit, ic.precision, ic.currentValue, ic.lastReadAt, ic.enabled FROM instrumentChannels ic JOIN weighingInstruments i ON ic.instrumentId = i.id WHERE i.deviceCode = 'C001' ORDER BY ic.channelNo;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT i.id, i.deviceCode, i.slaveId, i.modelType, cp.ipAddress, cp.networkPort FROM weighingInstruments i LEFT JOIN gatewayComPorts cp ON i.comPortId = cp.id WHERE i.deviceCode = 'C001'; SELECT ic.id, ic.channelNo, ic.label, ic.scale, ic.offset, ic.unit, ic.precision, ic.currentValue, ic.lastReadAt, ic.enabled FROM instrumentChannels ic JOIN weighingInstruments i ON ic.instrumentId = i.id WHERE i.deviceCode = 'C001' ORDER BY ic.channelNo;
